failedAssertions.reason: Transport filtering not implemented in iOS agent picker. InlineAgentSelectorView shows all agents as fully selectable regardless of transport compatibility. No grayed-out styling or 'Transport unavailable' subtitle. The Rust AgentInfo.detected_transports field exists but is not consumed by iOS views for filtering purposes. The picker uses [AgentType] directly rather than [AgentInfo] records.

testingMethod: Code inspection via flow validator subagents. iOS app built successfully (make ios-sim-fast), installed in simulator, but agent-browser cannot automate iOS Simulator apps. All verification done through source code analysis of Swift views and Rust FFI types.
